headline: Boxing Champion Accidentally Trains For Wrong Fight, Shows Up To Ring In Clown Costume
summary: The boxer, who was supposed to fight in the heavyweight championship, attended a children's birthday party by mistake.
fullBody: In a hilarious mixup that has become the talk of the boxing world, heavyweight champion Mike 'The Crusher' Muscles accidentally showed up to what he thought was his championship match wearing full clown makeup, oversized shoes, and a tiny car-sized punch mitt. It turns out he had confused his scheduled fight with an appearance at a children's birthday party that was supposed to be attended by 'Foolish the Clown,' not 'The Crusher.' The boxer reportedly entered the ring at the sports arena, saw no opponent, only children, and immediately asked 'why is everyone small?' before realizing his mistake. The children's party went surprisingly well, with the champion entertaining 40 kids for 3 hours. He has since filed a lawsuit against his calendar app for 'persistent scheduling errors.'
